seoTitle: Owens Gap vs Oxley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Owens Gap and Oxley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Owens Gap vs Oxley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Owens Gap and Oxley.
heading: Owens Gap vs Oxley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Owens Gap, New South Wales and Oxley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oxley has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Owens Gap (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Owens Gap or Oxley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Owens Gap has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Oxley scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Owens Gap scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Oxley scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Owens Gap or Oxley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oxley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
